availability_zone_group.description: The group of availability zones where the RDS instance can be launched.

availability_zones.description: A list of availability zones where the RDS instance is available.

engine_version.description: The version of the database engine used by the RDS instance.

id.description: A unique identifier for the RDS instance.

instance_class.description: The class type of the RDS instance which determines its computing capacity.

license_model.description: The licensing model for the RDS instance's database engine.

max_iops_per_db_instance.description: The maximum IOPS (Input/Output Operations Per Second) that the RDS instance can support.

max_iops_per_gib.description: The maximum IOPS per GiB of storage that the RDS instance can support.

max_storage_size.description: The maximum storage size, in gigabytes, that the RDS instance can support.

min_iops_per_db_instance.description: The minimum IOPS that the RDS instance can support.

min_iops_per_gib.description: The minimum IOPS per GiB of storage that the RDS instance can support.

min_storage_size.description: The minimum storage size, in gigabytes, that the RDS instance requires.

multi_az_capable.description: Indicates whether the RDS instance can be deployed in multiple availability zones for high availability.

outpost_capable.description: Indicates whether the RDS instance can be deployed on AWS Outposts.

read_replica_capable.description: Indicates whether the RDS instance supports read replicas for scaling read operations.

storage_type.description: The type of storage used by the RDS instance, such as standard, GP2, or IO1.

supported_engine_modes.description: A list of database engine modes supported by the RDS instance.

supported_network_types.description: A list of network types supported by the RDS instance, such as VPC.

supports_clusters.description: Indicates whether the RDS instance supports cluster deployments.

supports_enhanced_monitoring.description: Indicates whether the RDS instance supports enhanced monitoring for more detailed metrics.

supports_global_databases.description: Indicates whether the RDS instance supports global databases for cross-region replication.

supports_iam_database_authentication.description: Indicates whether the RDS instance supports IAM database authentication for improved security.

supports_iops.description: Indicates whether the RDS instance supports provisioned IOPS for faster disk performance.

supports_kerberos_authentication.description: Indicates whether the RDS instance supports Kerberos authentication for enhanced security.

supports_multi_az.description: Indicates whether the RDS instance can be configured for high availability across multiple availability zones.

supports_performance_insights.description: Indicates whether the RDS instance supports Performance Insights for advanced monitoring.

supports_storage_autoscaling.description: Indicates whether the RDS instance supports automatic scaling of storage capacity.

supports_storage_encryption.description: Indicates whether the RDS instance supports encryption for data at rest.

vpc.description: Indicates whether the RDS instance is deployed within a Virtual Private Cloud (VPC).
